skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    dn.full_name AS driver_name,
    r.race_name AS event_name,
    l.lap_time_ms AS fastest_lap_ms
  FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.public_laps AS l
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS s
    ON l.session_id = s.session_id
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS r
    ON s.race_id = r.race_id
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons AS sea
    ON r.season_id = sea.season_id
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
    ON l.driver_id = pd.driver_id
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS dn
    ON CAST(pd.driver_code AS STRING) = dn.driver_code AND sea.year = dn.season
  WHERE
    s.session_type = 'Q' AND sea.year = 2026
ORDER BY
  l.lap_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
